Arias... the people are a mystery of the official pro-Western history.
In reality, there are powerful tribes of our pre-Slavic ancestors who have conquered half of the world and are diligently stripped out of history by the West.
Today, the arias are very rarely remembered - they say, the arias conquered India, spoke on the sancrite, they were loved by the leadership of the German III Reich.
It is also sometimes recognized that the arias were tall, light-skinned, light-eyed and light-haired.
Let ’ s consider only the facts – where the arias came from and where the arias lived, the facts of the arias of the Russian North, the oral language of the arias, the chariots of the arias, the arias of the gixos of the pharaohs of Egypt, the appearance of the Egyptians.
And by the way, the Germans have nothing to do with it.
Aria is not one people, it is a group of related tribes and peoples.
According to the interpretation of archaeologists, this is at least Yamnaya and Catacomb culture - i.e. those who buried their dead, first in simple pits (sprinkled with ocher), and later in the form of catacombs or stone tombs under the mounds.
Honestly, it is also a culture of combed ceramics, Fatianovskaya, Afanasievskaya, cord ceramics, mid-Dnieper, Kura-Araksinskaya, Ezerskaya, Vucedolskaya, spherical amphorae, Andronovskaya, etc.
After all, only a part of the people left, and the other one remained in the old places.
The departed interacted with the new environment, the remaining ones with the new aliens.
There was a genetic mixing, a mutual cultural influence.
The size of the mounds of Yamnaya and Catacomb cultures testify to the organization, the existence of strong states – it is estimated that about 40 thousand man-days were spent on the construction of one of the mounds of mounds for the chief, with a diameter of 110 m and a height of 3.5 m.
The Aryans had many states – the Aryans were not united in political terms (as well as later in the Celtic and Slavic peoples).
These kingdoms were sometimes united into alliances, and sometimes fought among themselves.
Fortified cities were built, with complex defensive systems with moats and walls of stone (!) plates with a thickness of more than 3 m. The houses were large, with an area of about 160 square meters, and consisted of several rooms (residential and household).
There were 40-50 people living in each of these houses.
There were also unfortified settlements - they were grouped around cities, which also proves the existence of a state organization.
Traces of large settlements of Aryans have been found on the Volga and Kama.
There were built large houses of complex log construction with an area of 50 to 200 square meters with numerous hearths and household facilities.
Where did the arias come from?
Today, official lie-story claims that arias are "peoples of ancient Iran and ancient India", i.e. they are only Hindus and Iranians / Persians.
It's a lie.
However, some of the myth-historians agreed to consider the Central Asian region as the starting point for Aryan migration.
Which, too, is a lie.
The Aries went south of the polar cold after the death of their homeland of Hyperboreia about 13,000 years ago (see chapter "The Far Beginning...").
Aria came from the north, from our north!
But the relocation was very slow – along the movement of the glacier front.
The original territory is marked even in ancient books...
In the Bible, there are "unpreserved" texts describing the places of living of the Aryans (for example, the statement from the Book of the Righteous): "The sun stood in the midst of the sky and did not rush to the west for almost the whole day."
On the basis of such a Ball Tilak (1856-1920, an Indian researcher of texts "Rigveda", the author of the conclusion about the ancestor of Indo-Europeans in the Arctic) claimed that once arias (as well as the ancestors of all other peoples) lived in the northern latitudes.
In the oldest sacred book of Aryans "Avesta" (Zend-Avesta - 21 book / "Nazca" sacred texts of Zoroastrians, book of pre-glacial period) there is a mention that "... the homeland of Aryans was once a bright beautiful country, but the evil demon sent cold and snow on it...
Now in this once blooming country ten months of winter and only two - summer...
The sun came out only once, and the year turned into one night and one day. "
The options for such a climate are only one – the Russian Arctic.
Once again, the arias came from the north, where the ancestors of the ancient Slavs lived.
The Hindu Vedas (this is the most preserved part of the Aryan Vedas, written 6-9 thousand years ago) say that at this time, the bulk of the Aryans were still in the area of the Polar Circle, where she left many archaeological monuments about her presence.
These include many dolmens, stone spiral calendars and megalithic structures.
The burials of the Aryans of those times show that they were always filled with red ocher.
V.Shambarov 's hypothesis: it was from here that the name "boruses" or simply "russ" came, because "rus-rot-red-roho" in all languages of Europe means "red" or "red".
The facts say that the Praslavs (one of the branches of Ariev), settled the Russian Plain and until the next global catastrophe lived there for at least 40-50 thousand years, having writing (!), religion and calendar.
By the way, officially, people appeared on our planet only 40 thousand years ago.
Only archaeologists in 2008 found in the famous Denisov cave in Altai stone bracelet age from 50 thousand years.
The bracelet is very well polished with a small hole, which indicates the high development of the people who made it.
This finding - not the first, but only to hide it - failed...
In the resettlement of Aryans moving from the impending cold, it is possible to distinguish at least seven ways: The first ways of Aryans to eastern Europe – through the modern Czech Republic and up the Danube.
Pannonia Arias (the area at the junction of modern Hungary, Austria, Slovakia, Slovenia) became a center for the production of metal products - from here the tools (axes, knives, etc.) diverged throughout Central Europe.
Remains of large and developed cities are found in Otomani, Urmica, Mayena, Sava river (right tributary of the Danube), Tisa river (left tributary of the Danube) and Drava river (right tributary of the Danube).
In Otomani (now Slovakia), the city was surrounded by walls with towers protecting the entrance gate, and there was also an internal acropolis built with stone houses.
In the valley of the Danube and its tributaries, pile wooden houses were built on bridges - the remains of exactly the same dwellings were found in the Vologda region and in the Urals.
The second way to Europe is to the Baltic by 50-60 parallels (now the Baltic States, Sweden and Denmark).
By sea, the arias entered England and Ireland.
The legends of Scottish picts refer to the relocation from Eastern Europe.
And the stories from the Irish Book of Conquest report that "the tribe of the goddess Danu" (one of the main waves of the settlers), came to the island from the north, "driven by the Druids."
All Europe in those times were inhabited by wild tribes of Neanderthals and Cro-Magnon, until the end of their civilization never learned to speak and make tools of labor.
I repeat – these are times when dirty savages of Europe did not even know how to speak, and to them from the east came people who built stone houses and had writing.
These are the times when the Pharaohs of the Early and Ancient kingdoms ruled Egypt, and there was no pirated Rome at all!
The third way of the Aryans – to Thrace (south of Bulgaria and north-east of Turkey), through Bosphorus to Asia Minor (the strait itself was not yet, there were isthmus) – is the foundation of the Kingdom of Frigia.
The fourth way of the Aryan tribes is the south through the Caucasus and the foundation of the kingdoms.
This is both the kingdom of Urartu (the ancient Armenian kingdom of Van) and the kingdom of Mittani / Midia, which occupied the territory east of the Tiger River to the southern coast of the Caspian Sea.
The fifth way of the Aryans is through Central Asia to Afghanistan and the Iranian highlands.
Iran means Ariana, the country of Arias.
It was this part of the Vedic Aryans from the territory of Afghanistan who then penetrated the Inda Valley with several waves.
By the way, the Indian Aryan campaign is reflected in Russian legends - see the story of Volkh Vseslavevich, who fought with the Indian king.
The sixth way of Aryans is to East Turkestan (now Xinjiang Uyghur district of northwest China).
In Xinjiang, the Indo-Aryans founded a highly developed Tohar civilization (the word "tohar" means "white head", i.e. blondes).
There were built underground water supply and irrigation systems, which allowed to collect several crops per year, to grow the world 's best grapes, watermelons, fruits.
The seventh path of the Aryans - in the steppe strip to Transbaikalia and Manchuria.
Somewhere they have managed to penetrate deeply into China itself, forming their principalities there (people "di" - see chapter "Dinlina and Karasuksy").
Subsequently, during the bloody War of the Kingdoms (which took place in the 3rd century BC under the unification of China), these principalities were defeated and their population destroyed.
In the second half of the 2nd millennium BC, the settlement of the Aryans was largely completed, covering almost all of Europe and much of Asia.
Arias have mastered the vast spaces of Eurasia - from Spain to China and India.
But with each other, various tribes feared and fought even cooler than with strangers. Today, many researchers believe that the ancient civilization of Hyperboreia, which died as a result of climatic cataclysm, left after itself descendants in the face of the Slavs of Arias. And it was on the verge of the III-II millennia BC that the Arias were divided into two branches - Indo-Iranian long ago (already "calculated" by linguists).
It is important to say that the Aryan tribes had excellent knowledge of copper metallurgy.
Ancient copper developments have been found in the Urals and the Caucasus, and tin in Western Siberia and Kazakhstan.
By the way, in the subsequent centuries, the Russian population of the Urals and Siberia called ancient mines "miracle spears".
All Aryan tribes had a single culture, as evidenced by the total measure of length ("megalithic yard" = 82.9 cm), and the general "typical projects" (the structure of the city, megalites) and the location of sanctuaries ("observatories" - ring-shaped "crooks", chapels with altars, sacred groves).
The main sanctuaries were drawn to the 52nd parallel.
Mega-Yard was used in the construction of megalithic complexes both in Arkaim and Shili Square in Kazakhstan, and in Makotrjas near Prague, and on Mount Schlenza in Poland, and in Stonehenge.
Facts of Astronomy of Arias...
In Makotrjas, the straight lines between the east gate and the rectangle on the south side are the same – 302 meters.
And this is 365 megalithic yards, and the number 365 is the number of days a year.
The straight line, connecting the center of the eastern and western gates, goes to the point at which about 5,500 years ago the star Bethelgeise in the constellation Orion (the brightest) visited.
In this direction, with the help of the future Py-Fagorean theorem (the arias already knew it!), ancient astronomers could determine the position of the southern rectangle.
Direct from it to the eastern gate showed the point of the northern sunrise of the Moon (happens once every ~ 18 years).
If you look at the center of this gate from the south-west corner of the square, then the look falls on the point of the summer solstice.
And the view on the opposite side indicated the point of the winter solstice.
That was the kind of knowledge.
Similarly, in the Shili Square.
In 1987, in Siberia, near Magnitogorsk, the city of Aryov Arkaim (now Chelyabinsk region) was accidentally found with excellent preservation of the oldest monument.
From political correctness, Arkaim's age now dates back to the third millennium BC (according to K.K.Bystrushkin, he is 4.800 years old - see the book "Arkaim Phenomenon"), but the city is much older than the British Stonehenge (3030-2880 BC by radiocarbon analysis).
By the way, Arkaim's structure is exactly the same as Stonehenge, 1: 1.
The location of Arkaim Arias was chosen not by chance.
In the Urals passes the largest geological fault on the Earth.
In Avesta, this place is called the middle of the world.
It is here, not in Greenwich, that the true zero meridian passes (now – 60 degrees east longitude).
Archaeological excavations showed that it was a city, a temple and an "observatory", the so-called ring-shaft bagel, its population reached 2 thousand people.
Its structure resembles a huge horoscope with a diameter of 160 meters with clearly allocated twelve signs of the zodiac and 28 lunar parkings used in lunar astrology.
This "observatory" allowed ancient ministers and ministers to very accurately monitor 18 events of the annual astronomical cycle.
It affects the accuracy of measurements achieved in the ancient observatory – half of the angular minute (that is, one forty-three thousand part of the full circle).
This is due to the unique capabilities of the Arkaim horizon, which was used as a huge natural protractor.
Judging by the rich burials, female priestesses played a major role here.
The structure of Arkaim also contains the ancient Aryan symbol - swastika, symbolizing the evolution of the Cosmos and man.
And by the way, every house of Arkaim has a bronze casting furnace.
And in the same Greece (according to the office), bronze was in the second millennium BC.
Around Arkaim were also found the remains of about twenty other cities, its peers with other purposes.
An oblivion attempt...
Have you heard a lot of TV programs about our ancient Ural Arkaim?
They're just not there.
And the Shili square of Kazakhstan was generally discovered by the traveler Nikolai Rychkov (1746-1798, captain of the field regiment, geographer) in 1771 and "forgotten"...
It was reopened only in 2008 by Google Earth.
This is how official false historians try to hide the truth about the arias of Siberia.
Their society of arias was divided into three castes (i.e. groups – into barns), because they believed that each person after birth has a certain natural essence.
Varna means "essence."
The highest barn – the brahmans – occupied the high position of priests, guardians of ancient knowledge in society.
The second warna (class) was kshatria - warriors.
They went into battle under the leadership of their Raj chiefs.
The third barn is Vaishi, that is, peasants, artisans and traders.
This three-caste division was typical of all Aryan peoples.
Plus, there were non-caste, untouchable.
And it was the Brahmans, the Kshatriyas and the Vaishyas (about 30% of the population) who called themselves "Aryas".
And the lower were to serve them - they came from the indigenous peoples.
There were also shudras, servants.
Their enemies, local black tribes, arias called "dasi" or "dasa", which meant "barbarian", "stranger", "lower".
Later, the word began to mean "slave."
Many scientists believe that the caste is shudr - servants / slaves, formed from dasya.
Vedic religion (from which modern Hinduism originated) dominated the spiritual life of the Aryans.
Vedic religion is related to ancient Slavic beliefs.
The very word "Veda" closely Slavic "to know" - to know.
In the middle of II thousand BC, it was on the territory of our country that another world religion emerged - Zoroastrianism.
"Based on the content and language of the hymns built by the Zoroaster, it is now established that in reality the prophet Zoroaster lived in the Asian steppes east of the Volga."
The Zoroaster was the first to foresee the coming coming coming into the world of the Savior, the Messiah.
He wandered a lot and found refuge in the powerful kingdom of Khairat in the Southern Urals.
The king of Avvataspa ruled there, and then his successor, Vishtaspa.
Who became the patron saint of Zoroastra, the first converted.
And he introduced a new religion in his country.
Its foundations were set out in three books "Avesta" - "Yasna", "Yashty" and "Videvdat".
In Central Asia, Aryans created another world religion - mitraism.
And mitraism is the concept of a single God (was pantheistic).
Interesting facts: The ornament on the embroideries of the Russian North is absolutely identical to the ornaments of those archaeological cultures of the III-II millennium BC, which belong to the so-called "Aryan circle".

▲ Machu Picchu is believed to have been built in the Inca Empire in the 15th century.
(Photo / Dazhi Images / Associated Press) Intern Journalist Cui Zirou / Comprehensive Report Machu Picchu, Peru ’ s most iconic cultural site, has been arrested by police for leaving excrement in the unopened shrine and marks on the stone in the shrine, which are suspected of destroying cultural heritage.
Machu Picchu has been a popular spot for "naked patties", which Peruvian authorities consider to be an "anti-cultural crime", with serious cases punishable by a fine or imprisonment for 3 to 8 years.
According to foreign media reports, the park maintenance staff found six tourists entering the forbidden area in the temple on the 12th and informed the police to arrest them, including a French, a Chilean, two Argentines and two Brazilians.
A crack in a stone can be seen at the scene, the floor is also cracked, and even excrement is left in the temple. If the crime is confirmed, they will be sentenced to at least four years' imprisonment.
▲ Machu Picchu was gradually deserted after being attacked by the Spaniards and was not seen again until 1911 by American explorer Hiram Bingham. Machu Picchu, known as the "City of the Sky", is the most representative site of the Inca Empire, built around 1440, on a ridge of 2,350 to 2,430 meters above sea level. It is divided into three regions: Temple of the Sun, Temple of the Condor, and Intihuatana Stone.
In order to extend protection, President Martin Vizcarra announced on the 9th of this month that one million trees will be planted on about 35,000 hectares of land around Machu Picchu to prevent landslides or forest fires from destroying the site.

From July 1, Machu Picchu will be able to visit only 500 tourists per day The famous city of the Inca Machu Picchu, which will again be available for tourists from July 1, will be able to visit no more than 500 people per day.
Previously, the attraction was visited by about five thousand tourists a day.
"According to the document we called the Machu Picchu Agreement, we are obliged to execute the protocols.
The number of tourists who will visit Machu Picchu will be about 500 at best ", - said the Mayor of Aguas Calientes (or Machu Picchu) Darwin Baca León.
According to him, this will have a serious impact on the local economy, since tourism is the main source of income.
More than a thousand owners of restaurants, hotels and souvenir shops are waiting for the return of tourists.
But in the first stage, only 20-30% of them will be opened.
Before visiting Machu Picchu, you must wash your hands and put on a mask.
It is also necessary to observe the social distance.
Previously, "Pravda.Ru" wrote that the Incas specifically built Machu Picchu at the site of fractures.

Visions of America, LLC / Alamy A thousand years ago, the people of Chaku formed a thriving civilization in the burning desert and built impeccable buildings that reveal many aspects of their culture.
These buildings are now in danger.
In the heart of the San Juan area, in a grassy area located in the northwest corner of New Mexico, one of the largest treasures in the United States: well protected remains of a vast construction complex that is said to have been built between 1250 and 850 BC, possibly nearly 5,000 people.
The desert area of the Chaco Valley has cold winters and hot summers, and the annual rainfall is only 22 cm.
Here, but the land of thriving and yet mysterious civilization was the Chaco, an Indian tribe of an ethnic ancestor named Pueblo.
In 1907, it became the National Historic Park, located in the desert, which covers an area of about 137 km and contains the remains of 13 major archeological sites and more than 400 archeological sites.
The largest excavated site in the area is called Pueblo Bonito, which covers an area of ​ ​ approximately 8,000 square meters, and a building in the form of the English "D" that contains about 800 rooms.
The area, which is estimated to have nearly two thousand inhabitants, has complex irrigation systems and its ports were designed for ease of transportation in an extraordinary way.
Today, visitors can walk through the same halls and passages that the residents of this building used nearly a thousand years ago.
Some of the structures used for building different roofs and floors have been destroyed for a long time, but their remnants reveal how they were built.
Nearly 200,000 wooden columns have been used in the construction of the complex, which is most likely carried by hand from the Chauska and Taylor mountain range 112 kilometers away.
The roads are another amazing feature of the Chaco civilization.
There are about 650 km of road in this complex, some of which are 9 meters in width.
Most of these roads are made in flat lines that pass through the natural areas of high and low.
Beyond the YouTube post No. of BBC Reel Warning: Content related to the third party may include the ad End of the Youtube post No. of BBC Reel Copyright Image of BBC Reel BBC Reel The location of the roads that began from the central structure and ended up in an interesting natural area including the lake or mountains, indicating that they were a symbol of the relationship between man and nature.
Of course, it doesn ’ t mean they didn ’ t work out: studies have shown that walking on these roads makes people less tired than the rough terrain next to them.
Over the years, archaeologists have come up with a variety of theories about why Chaco was built.
Although this place seems to be a commercial center, the buildings in it indicate that it was probably a place to hold important ceremonies. These buildings are also a sign of the amazing knowledge of the people of Chaco in astronomy.
The walls of this place are aligned with the sun's rising axis in moderation, and its northern port is facing the true north.
Today 's Pueblo Indians in New Mexico, including the Zuni people, still view the Chaco Valley as a sacred place and return to the region for their ritual rituals.
The National Historic Park of Chaco Culture and other smaller locations related to the people have been registered as a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1987.
Over the past few years, drilling and mining of oil and gas, as well as mining, has been the biggest threat to the Chaco Valley.
In 2019, the Chaku Cultural Heritage Protection Act was submitted to the U.S. Senate, a bill by which such activities would be banned within a 16 km radius of the region.

In the mid-term elections of the United States last year, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, a left-wing Democrat, was elected as the youngest member of Congress at the age of 29.
Cortez, who had been attacked by conservative media since her election, gained popularity for her.
In just a few months, she has advocated bold policies to raise the marginal tax rate for individuals earning more than $10 million a year to 70%, and the Green New Deal program to address the impending climate crisis in all its aspects, becoming a hot topic in American politics.
The Green Deal was named after President Roosevelt Jr., who in the 1930s dealt with the drastic reform of the New Deal during the Great Depression.
In addition to promoting zero-carbon emission reduction and the use of renewable energy, Cortés also advocates climate policies that actively assist people affected by extreme weather, subsidize farmers and pastoralists to develop sustainable economic models, repair damaged ecosystems, and strengthen infrastructure for mass transit.
"The Green New Deal," of course, attracted a tongue-in-cheek teasing from US President Donald Trump, who tweeted that Democrats would "permanently destroy all aircraft, cars, dairy cattle, oil, gas and armies... smart!" No one knows what it is. "
A pro-business British Economist also wrote a critique that his plan was vague, and that it was merely an aerial building.
However, many Democrats who have now announced their candidacy for the next presidential election, regardless of the moderate faction of the Progressive Party, have unanimously supported Cortés' proposal.
Climate policy will become the focus of the presidential election in two years' time.
US President Donald Trump withdrew from the Paris Climate Agreement in 2017, ignoring international opposition. (Reuters) Mr. Trump disdained Mr. Cortez ’ s “Green Deal ” plan.
In his election campaign, he has claimed that global warming is a Chinese-made deception, and since taking office he has withdrawn from the Paris Climate Agreement without regard to public anger, and recently when Democratic Party Senator Amy Klobuchar announced her candidacy in the snow, Trump mocked her for playing global warming like a snowman.
As the world ’ s second largest carbon emitter, Trump ’ s defiant and negative attitude toward climate change is a cause for concern.
The climate crisis is not one country, one continent, but affects the future of 7.5 billion human beings around the world.
Although there is no evidence that this is a direct result of climate change, the global average temperature is rising, the speed of ice melting in the North and South poles is accelerating, and extreme weather is becoming increasingly frequent.
The Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Observatory, Mr Lam Chao-ying, has been tirelessly urging Hong Kong people to respond to the climate crisis.
Indeed, at a time when the global economic chain is interlinked, it is easy to achieve what President Lin has said about less food imported from foreign countries and less shopping online.
On the other side, some commentators argue that carbon emissions should be taken up at the government level, and that individual action will not help solve the climate problem.
However, when the climate crisis is imminent, there is definitely much to be done by bottom-up universal action.
Mr Lam suggested that the people of Hong Kong should "eat less Brazilian chicken wings" and reduce online shopping in order to reduce carbon emissions and create unnecessary packaging. Of course, the Government really has to take more responsibility for global warming.
In 2017, the Environment Bureau released the Hong Kong Climate Action Plan 2030 +, which aims to reduce per capita carbon emissions from 5.7 tonnes in 2016 to 3.3 tonnes to 3.8 tonnes in 2030.
Moreover, since Hong Kong is one of the largest carbon emitters in the world and one of the cities in the Greater Bay Area, why does the Government not take the lead in promoting renewable energy and reducing waste and plastic waste to improve the air and health of the residents in the region on the basis of the Air Quality Management Plan for the Pearl River Delta Region?
The climate crisis is about the fate of 7.5 billion people around the world and must not be overlooked.
We must, of course, seriously repudiate Trump ’ s attitude of not acknowledging climate change, but we must also be alert to the ideal cynicism of taking action to rescue climate change as an air palace and a deserted place.
It is the responsibility of the Government to formulate a more comprehensive and progressive climate policy. As far as the individual is concerned, building a culture of environmental protection for all people is a long way off, but we must not do anything but good, but to create a green planet, not just for ourselves, but for the well-being of our next generation.

In the United States, the first of the planned three books of memoirs of former US Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice is published.
Rice's book "Extraordinary, Ordinary People: A Memoir of Family" will be on sale tomorrow, October 14.
Rice talks about his family's life in Birmingham, where, she writes, "in the 1950s, white and black people lived in parallel worlds, facing each other in only a few public places," reports Lenta.ru.
In 1950-1960, Birmingham was at the heart of the struggle of the Afro-American population for its rights.
The former U.S. Secretary of State also recalls how much she and her environment were impressed by the assassination of President John F. Kennedy, "perceived by blacks as a personal threat".
Rice's first book of memoirs ends in 2000, when she was appointed National Security Adviser to George W. Bush, who began his first presidential term.
Eight years of his work in the Bush administration, which brought Rice the title of the most influential woman in the world, the former Secretary of State promises to describe in the next volume of memories that will be released in 2011.

A statement by the former Chief Secretary for Administration, Mrs Anson Chan, announced her withdrawal from the political arena, and the news immediately aroused concern.
For more than half a century, Mrs Chan, nicknamed "Mrs Chan" and "Mrs Chan 40,000," has been known to be one of the most politically influential women in Hong Kong.
Since the reunification, the political turmoil surrounding her has continued, including her sudden resignation in 2001 and her appointment to the Legislative Council in 2007.
In the early days of the reunification, Mrs Chan had a great influence in the local political and government circles, especially in the early days of the reunification, when the Government paid tribute to the second chair of the Hong Kong Government and led the 180,000 civil servants, who were the leaders of the official "Handbag Party" (Women's Senior Officials Party).
Four months later, in January 2001, Mrs Chan announced her resignation and early retirement, ending her seven-month and two-day official career in 38 years, as well as a three-year and 10-month "Chan Dong Matty". It is officially closed.
She later delivered her last speech at a luncheon of the Asian Association, which lasted up to half an hour, when she talked about the operation of the government after the reunification, saying that the civil servants should be employed as a principle of perseverance, and that it was their primary duty to speak directly to those in power.
"Under such a system, civil servants are unable to walk in the blue by flattery, political correctness, fondness or flattery.
In a more politicized system, these drawbacks are inevitable.
It can be seen that there was something in Mrs Chan's words that caused a stir in society at the time.
After Mrs Chan left the government, her influence was not only sealed as "Hong Kong conscience", but also pushed for "double universal suffrage" among the people, including her high profile participation in the July 1 march in 2007, which was supported by many democrats, but also criticized by some democrats for "sudden democracy."
In September of the same year, she announced that as an independent, she would compete for the Hong Kong Island seat of the Legislative Council after the death of the President of the Democratic Alliance for the Betterment of Hong Kong (DAB), and defeated her opponent, former Secretary for Security, Mrs Regina Ip.
In 2013, Mrs Chan led the establishment of "Hong Kong 2020", which includes former Legislative Councillor Allen Lee, University of Hong Kong legal scholar Chan Man-min, barrister Lee Chi-hi, and others, with the aim of promoting universal suffrage in Hong Kong.
In recent years, the democrats have adopted the "international line" strategy, which is to seek support from foreign countries. In particular, during the anti-reform period, the Hong Kong people, such as Huang Zhifeng and Luo Guanzhong, have visited Europe and the United States to persuade local political circles to intervene.
On April 6, 2014, she met with US Vice President Joe Biden at the White House to discuss the development of Hong Kong, criticizing the weakening of "one country, two systems" and Hong Kong's freedom of speech. Freedom of the press and freedom of assembly.
After the controversy over the Hong Kong Government's proposed amendment to the Fugitive Offenders Ordinance last year, Mrs Chan, together with Legislative Councillor Kwok Wing-hung of the legal profession and the Information and Technology Councillor, Mr Mok Nai-kwong, met with officials of the National Security Council of the United States to discuss the new annual report on the Hong Kong Policy Law released by the State Department and to discuss the amendment to the Fugitive Offenders Ordinance.
At that time, Anson Chen was interviewed by Vice President Chris Pence at the White House on the issue of "one country, two systems" for human rights freedoms.
Since the introduction of the "Hong Kong version of the national security law," the establishment faction has always said that Chen Fang Ansheng is a "high-risk person."
Last month, on the eve of the National People's Congress' examination of the Hong Kong version of the national security motion, the official People's Daily published a reviewer's article.

Scientists seem to have discovered the secret of the origin of organic matter in meteorites coming from the Red Planet.
The list of participants in the process sounds like this: water, volcanic rocks, electricity.
Pleasantly, such processes can go on many bodies of the Solar System.
Scientists seem to have discovered the secret of the origin of organic matter in meteorites coming from the Red Planet.
The formation of organic matter is due to natural "accumulators" consisting of water, salts and volcanic rocks.
What is pleasant, such processes can go on many bodies of the Solar system.Such conclusions are made in a scientific article published in the journal Science Advanced by a group led by Andrew Steele from the Carnegie Scientific Institute in the USA. Recall that proteins, fats, carbohydrates, DNA, RNA and many other molecules, without which it is impossible to imagine a living organism, belong to organic substances.
Of course, not all organic matter is an integral part of living beings or is formed with their participation, so it is not necessary to put a sign of equality between organic matter and life. However, the presence of such molecules is the most important condition for the appearance of the biosphere.
It seems that only organic chemistry can provide the diversity, flexibility and complexity of chemical processes that even the most primitive microbe needs to exist.
In 2012, a team led by the same Style studied carbon from organic molecules found in ten Martian meteorites.
The researchers came to two conclusions, pleasant and not very.
The good news is that this organic matter was formed on Mars (not introduced by pollution on Earth).
Bad news: it is not a product of life activity of living organisms. How is it formed in this case?
This is what the authors of the recent study found out. "The identification of the processes during which organic carbon compounds are formed on Mars is of great interest in determining its habitability potential," says Steel.Scientists used three samples of Martian meteorites.
The first of them was Tissint, which fell in 2011 in Morocco.
The second is Nahla, discovered in Egypt in 1911.
The third was the NWA 1950 found in Morocco in 2001.
In all these celestial stones, the inclusions of the Martian organics were previously discovered. The meteorites were subjected to the most thorough analysis.
Among the methods used were both the usual examination of the sample into the optical microscope, and Raman spectroscopy, translucent electron microscopy, nanoscale mass spectrometry of secondary ions, X-ray absorption spectroscopy near the edge of absorption (X-ray absorption near-edge structure) and other methods with incomprehensible naming. Thanks to all these methods, The authors thoroughly studied the chemical composition and fine structure of organic inclusions and their surrounding rocks.
By the way, it turned out that meteorite organics are extremely similar to those found on the Red Planet by the MSL mission.
What once again confirmed the Martian origin of the molecule. The detailed information obtained allowed scientists to draw conclusions on what processes could lead to the formation of these substances. It turned out that one of the necessary ingredients is volcanic minerals such as spinels.
On the Red Planet, rich in ancient volcanoes, there is no shortage of such material.
The second important component is liquid water, in huge concentrations containing various salts (in particular perchlorates).
Such brines have never been directly detected on Mars, but according to experts, they can exist almost everywhere.
Finally, the third element of the "witch's potion" is carbon dioxide.
He too, to put it mildly, is not in deficit: the Martian atmosphere consists of it almost completely. When these three substances meet together, an electrochemical reaction begins.
For a while, there is something like a natural battery.
As a result, organic compounds are formed from carbon CO2 and hydrogen of water. "The discovery that the natural system can essentially form a small corrosion-based battery that controls the electrochemical reactions between minerals and the surrounding liquid has serious consequences for astrobiology," says Stil.Indeed, it turned out that organic synthesis does not require exotic conditions or components.
All the necessary ingredients are quite common for Mars, which is either already proven (volcanic minerals and carbon dioxide) or assumed (brines).
Moreover, such a process can take place on bodies such as Europe or Encelad.
It could enrich the organic matter and the oldest Earth.Recall that earlier "33Live.RuNauka" (nauka.vesti.ru) wrote about how a record amount of organics was found on Mars, as well as about the fact that life in the crust of the planet could be supported by radiation.

According to Mehr News Agency, a quote from Niwales, although life on Earth has undoubtedly begun, more evidence of the existence of vital elements is being observed in space every day.
The most recent elements discovered in the world are a special type of sugary and essential substances for life.
This material is found in meteorites.
By powdering samples of two "NWA801" meteorites discovered in Morocco in 2001 and "Morchinson" observed in Australia in 1969, scientists discovered these sugars.
They analyzed the samples using gas chromatography mass spectrometry.
This method helps identify different molecules based on their volume and electric charge.
In this way, researchers discovered a variety of sugars, including ribose, arabinosis, and xylosis, at concentrations between 2.3 and 11 particles per billion in NWA801 and between 6.7 and 180 particles per million in Morchison.
These sugars are important for life formation, and ribose is particularly a vital component of RNA.
Yoshihirofurukawa, a senior researcher in the study, says that other important elements of life have already been discovered in meteorites, such as amino acids, but sugars were a lost part of life's constituent elements.
This is the first direct indication of the existence of ribose in space and its transfer to the Earth.

Russian geologists discovered a new mineral in the cracks of the volcano in Kamchatka and gave it the name dravertitis.
The newspaper Izvestia writes about this.
Scientists investigated Tolbachik volcano in Kamchatka.
From the volcanic cracks, they took samples of minerals that seemed strange to them.
The electron probe microanalyzer helped to establish the chemical composition of the find.
Advertising "It turned out to be a mixture of sulphates - copper with a mixture of zinc and a small amount of magnesium, with the complete absence of hydrogen-containing groups.
At the same time, hydrogen-free sulphates of both copper and magnesium in nature are quite rare, ” the newspaper writes.
One of the participants of the study, the chief researcher of the Department of mineralogy of the geological faculty of Moscow State University Igor Pekov said that most of the recently discovered minerals have a complex chemical composition.
"The sample we found is very simple.
At the same time, at the time of the discovery of its analogues or close "relatives", both chemically and structurally, it was not found even among the much more numerous synthetic inorganic substances, "said Pekov.
It is emphasized that the open mineral turned out to be resistant to chemical "aggressors".
The discovery was named after the Soviet specialist in mineralogy, geology and meteorite study Peter Dravert.

Researchers have discovered the oldest material on the planet that is much older than the planet itself.
Accordingly, researchers found that particles isolated from a meteorite that crashed in Australia are between five and seven billion years old, meaning they're older than the Earth, the Sun, and the Solar System.
According to ISNA and New Atlas, Presolar grains, such as found in the Murchison meteorite, can reveal a history of the time before the Solar System was formed.
In 1969, the city of Morrison in Victoria, Australia hosted a meteorite.
Parts of the 100 kg meteorite, named after the city, were found in an area of more than 13 square kilometers.
This meteorite, which was composed of exotic space rocks, has always been widely studied and brings interesting results.
For example, last year it was found to contain extraterrestrial sugars that were necessary for the emergence of life on Earth.
Now researchers at the Zurich Institute of Technology (ETH) have found that the “Morrison ” meteorite also contains examples of the oldest material ever found on Earth.
About 30 years ago, it was found that the meteorite had "pre-Khshidi particles", which are called tiny silicon carbide grains that are older than the sun, but their exact age had not yet been determined.
To understand this, researchers measured in their new study how long these pre-solar seeds have been exposed to cosmic rays.
These energetic particles rotate around the space and they can pass through the solids and interact with them to create new elements in existing minerals.
This means that scientists can measure the amount of these new elements in these seeds to determine how long they've been floating in space and how old they are.
By doing this, researchers found that most of these seeds were between 4.6 and 4.
They're nine billion years old.
The Sun is 4.6 billion years old, and the Earth was formed 4.5 billion years ago.
But the oldest particles between these seeds date to more than 5.5 billion years ago, making them the oldest known material on Earth.
This group says that the history of these seeds can be traced back to the stars that were born about 7 billion years ago.
According to researchers, this finding shows that our galaxy has been through a rough period of stellar formation during that time.
Pre-solar seeds were discovered in other meteorites such as "Hypatia Stone" and "LAP-149", but their age is not detectable.
The research has been published in the PNAS Journal.
The end of the message

(Taiwan English News / International Group) Machu Picchu, a world-renowned tourist attraction, will control the number of visitors to prevent further deterioration of the stone castle site of the ancient Inca Empire.
The effectiveness of the control will also be assessed and permanent measures will be introduced.
Machu Picchu, known as the "City of the Sky", is a monument to Peru ’ s famous pre-Columbian Inca Empire and one of the world ’ s seven new wonders.
AFP reported that the Peruvian government said that between 15 and 28 days, the three sites of Machu Picchu's Temple of the Sun, the Temple of the Condor and the Intihuatana Stone would be strictly controlled.
The Central News Agency reported that the Peruvian Ministry of Culture said that the authorities had found signs of deterioration in the stone surfaces of the three sites caused by tourists and that it was necessary to propose such measures to protect Machu Picchu.
The latest control plan limits the number of people entering the park by two waves per day to nearly 6,000, with a time limit of three hours.
The authorities concerned will assess the effectiveness of the control measures and introduce permanent permanent measures on 1 June.

The copyright of the AP Image capture 3D imagery of archaeologists to show the details of the newly discovered pyramid A new structure was discovered under an ancient Mayan pyramid in eastern Mexico, and archaeologists have found that it has nested structure like Russian dolls known as Matrushka.
The third small pyramid under the famous Coculkan Pyramid was found in the ancient Mayan collection of Chechnya Itza in the Yucatan Province of Mexico.
Researchers have been able to discover a 10-metre pyramid under a 20-metre pyramid, hidden under a 30-metre pyramid.
According to archaeologists, the exploration of the smallest pyramid was carried out using a non-destructive technique and throwing light into the pyramid to see its interior parts, without damaging the structure.
One of the researchers who announced the discovery at the press conference said, "These pyramids are like your dolls in Russian.
Under the Great Pyramid, another pyramid is found, and under it another pyramid is found. "
This new discovery shows that the Mayan pyramids were built in three stages.
The peak of the Mayan civilization in Central America was the sixth century AD.
New archaeologists found that the smallest pyramid that was recently discovered was built between 550 and 800 AD.
It is estimated that the middle pyramid, discovered in the 1930s, was built between 800 and 1000 AD, while the larger pyramid was completed almost in the 1950s to 1300.
Photo copyright AFP Image capture Pyramid Coculkan is one of the most important monuments of the ancient collection Chechnya Itza in Mexico. Experts say pyramids were built inside each other for various reasons, including whether the existing pyramid was worn out or a new leader was gaining power.
This new discovery can provide new information about the early Maya civilization, information about when their cultures intertwined with other Central Mexican ethnic groups.
Archaeologists discovered last year that the Pyramid of Coculcan was built on a deep well or an underground river that the Mayans considered sacred.
Chechnya Itza is on the UNESCO World Heritage List and more than one million people travel to Mexico every year to visit this ancient collection.

In 1978, the President of the United States, the Carter Administration, was preparing to establish diplomatic relations with the People ’ s Republic of China. I was studying at Harvard Law School.
I have followed the relevant information closely, and I am worried that Taiwan's diplomatic impact will soon come.
But during the martial law period in Taiwan, there was no freedom of speech or reporting, and almost all of the country was immersed in the state of "everything is OK if there is a government of the Kuomintang."
After a few struggles, I decided to give up my scholarship and go back to Taiwan to run for election as a representative of the central government, only because during the election period, candidates enjoyed a short "speech holiday" and could express their political views.
I have not considered whether or not I will be elected, or what will happen after the election.
Once I decided, I put myself into the Yanjing Library at Harvard, and asked a few of my colleagues from Boston to accompany me to Yanjing to search for relevant information.
I am prepared to address a series of discussions on "Taiwan's past and future" at a political conference, including the news that I have learned about the establishment of diplomatic relations between the United States and China.
In a large number of borrowed books, I fumbled into the past of Taiwan, feeling very remote, very strange. For me who was born in Taiwan and grew up in Taiwan, I was not only surprised, but also ashamed.
It turns out that the Kuomintang textbook is based on a view of Taiwan as a small country in Greater China.
In 1975, when I visited the women's movement in the United States and returned to Songshan Airport, my luggage was searched, and all the information on the inspection was confiscated. A generation of unimaginable martial arts experiences.
After arriving in China, I quickly washed out the film, transcribed it word by word, and sent the photocopy to Huang Hsin-suke and Kang Ning-hsiang.
Not long after my friend sent me a message: "Better burn it!" I would not burn it, but I did not dare to find a publishing house, only asked my friends to type a simple printed book called "The Past and Future of Taiwan".
On that occasion, when I returned to Taoyuan County to run for the National Assembly, I used a novel speech at a political conference to talk about Taiwan's tragic past, and about the future of Taiwan's crisis.
There are many people who listen to me and tell me about Taiwan's past misfortunes and tears.
On the seventh day of the election campaign, I was halfway through my speech.
On the morning of December 16, 1978, just a week after the polling day, the United States and China announced that they would establish diplomatic relations the following year.
But anyone who has heard my speech has come to realize that I admire and admire the fact that the United States and China have established diplomatic relations, but the police have always come forward with the news that they are going to arrest me.
She wrote a new book, "What's wrong with the two sides of the river?"
In the post-election period of the People ’ s Daily newspaper, I revised and published the book. Many people in the north and south told me that “The Past and the Future of Taiwan ” was the enlightenment of their Taiwanese consciousness.
The following year, I was arrested and imprisoned for the Miri Island incident, and the investigators took great care of me to write that book, accusing me of not talking about the history of so many of Taiwan, and shaking the political theories of many Kuomintang.
I was sentenced to 12 years in prison, mainly because I was the main speaker of the Kaohsiung Human Rights Convention, and partly because the Kuomintang recognized me as the "Enlightenment of Taiwan Independence" and hated me.
It is strange that the Taiwanese have become a renegade when they write about the history of Taiwan.
Geng Zi Plague Capture History In the course of Taiwan's modern history, I was almost unserviceable.
My solemn life steps leave behind the footsteps of women's rights, human rights, democracy and the rule of law. More importantly, Taiwan's dignity and world peace are my lifelong concern and ambition, and I write this book.
In the 2020 Geng Zi Year, which has ravaged the world with COVID-19, I wrote a book close to my heart. On the one hand, I have been studying the Taiwan issue for 40 years, and on the other hand, I have carefully captured the ever-changing international situation, especially the relationship between the US and Taiwan Triangle.
When I was Vice President, I wrote two books on the future of Taiwan: "Taiwan's Great Future" (2004) and "Taiwan in the World" (2007).
The former talks about the future of Taiwan in the ocean, while the latter looks at the world and explores Taiwan's situation.
By the time I wrote this book, I had gone through my life, had cancer, had been in prison, had been shot in 319 shootings, and had been the only two vice presidents in Taiwan.
The footprints are spread across five continents, and my reading and thinking are naturally different from those of my youth.
In particular, I see the atypical World War III caused by COVID-19, and I believe that it is the creator of the universe who warned mankind through COVID-19, not to spoil the earth, not to spoil human civilization again!
Lu Xiulian: The World's Taiwan and the Great Future of Taiwan.
I was originally called COVID-19 by Geng Zi Plague, and soon I realized that it was an "atypical world war".
In the past, our enemies were separated from each other, and this time we fought together against our invisible and invisible enemies.
COVID-19 challenges national hegemony and national leadership, challenges globalization and the modern industry chain, and challenges "people, really is the spirit of all things"? China, the United States, Iran....
Which one is a real power?
Who's the real strongman?
The epidemic has seen the fragility of life, and the fragility of people – especially political people – but also the arrogance of arrogance.
The world should work together to fight COVID-19, but I didn ’ t think that the world ’ s second and oldest, such as the Chinese Dragon and the American Eagle, was struggling against the ravages of the epidemic.
Because of its unique strategic value, Taiwan has been swept into the game in the United States and China, becoming a target for archery.
God blessed Taiwan, and spared us from the disease, but escaped the fate of the scapegoat who fought against the dragon eagle.
Since World War II, the strategic triangular relationship between Taiwan and the United States has been complicated. Looking back on past history, COVID-19 has brought about a daily epidemic. Stop the damage.
Will the war come? I cannot predict, we must try to avoid the evil, reduce casualties and harm.
This book explores the relationship between Taiwan and the United States in three stages: the past, the present, and the future. In writing, I focus on the definition of "historical blind spots"; in writing, I focus on the current difficulties and crises in the US and Taiwan; and in the future, I think that the mood of the next generation to create a new path beyond reunification and the possibilities of the United States and its friends.
In the book, it is written, covering both ancient and modern times and the whole world, and the four seas of the world, the transformation of the object and the star.
Looking back at the past, looking forward to the future; cherishing Taiwan, but looking at the world; remembering sorrow, and surpassing hatred.
In a word, I use the tragedy of history to look back on the mistakes and regrets of history, and to use the vision of the future to make a difference in the happiness of the next generation.
If time can backflow, history can backflow, let 's think together: 1.)
In the absence of the Treaty of Shimonoseki, would Taiwan, in the 50 years between 1895 and 1945, have to follow China through the bumpy history of "overthrowing the Manchu dynasty, cutting the warlords, fighting against Japan, and fighting against the Chinese Communists"? 2.
Prior to the end of World War II, the U.S. Navy had previously captured Taiwan and destroyed Japan's "X Island Plan", which was later replaced by the Army's plan to "capture Luzon and Okinawa and destroy Japan".
Otherwise, Taiwan has long been an occupied territory of the United States. After the war, it should be decided to establish an independent country through the residents in accordance with the Charter of the United Nations. 3.)
If there is no Cairo Declaration, Chen ’ s army should withdraw from Taiwan after accepting Japan ’ s surrender, and Chiang Kai-shek will not withdraw to Taiwan. Taiwan and China will not be entangled. 4.)
Mao originally planned to conquer Taiwan after overthrowing the ROC, and US President Harry Truman had earlier announced that he would not ask Taiwan questions.
If the Korean War did not break out, would Taiwan be redacted in the 1950s? 5.)
The People's Republic of China ruled out the Republic of China in 1971, entering the United Nations and becoming a permanent member of the Security Council.
If Chiang Kai-shek accepted "two Chinas" or even "one China, one Taiwan" at that time, Taiwan would not become an international orphan.
Or, by accepting the Saudi Arabian proposal as soon as possible, Taiwan may have long been a neutral state.
6.) The United States recognized the Republic of China until the establishment of diplomatic relations with the People's Republic of China on New Year's Day 1979.
If Chiang Ching-kuo had declared "two Chinas" or "one China, one Taiwan" at that time, would Taiwan's international situation not have to be so sad?
Of course, time will not reverse, and history will not repeat itself, but all these "hypotheses" are the key factors in turning Taiwan's destiny.
But what time is it, and which one is led by the people of Taiwan?
Looking at the world, the historical fate of the island nation is that the fate of the ethnic group is dominated by outsiders.
It was not until the end of World War II that the islands, which were forced to provide battlefield and warriors during the war, held a referendum under the auspices of the United Nations to determine the fate of the ethnic groups.
But what about the people of Taiwan? The people of Taiwan should use their will and wisdom to seize the opportunity of history and turn the island's destiny into a glorious future!
If you have the pleasure of reading this book, I ask you to put aside your existing prejudices, re-read history, clean up the blind spots, and think about the next generation ’ s new future with a broad view of the sea and the sky.
Why do we have to struggle for independence? Choose a side station between the United States and the United States?
Instead of wandering around in historical tragedy, we should go out of loneliness, good neighbourliness, and a good world; let our next generation, not only run Taiwan, but also the world.

In the course of writing, we received the encouragement and instruction of the former Vice President of the Court of Justice, Mr. Chung-mo Ko Ying-mao, former representative to the European Union, Mr. Ju Zhao-lin, former representative to the United States, and Mr. Tian Jun-mei, former director of the Chinese Institute of Economic Research.
In addition, the search for the reference materials, as well as the printing and compilation of manuscripts, have been able to assist her colleagues, Princess Su Yen-fei, especially Chen Zheng-han, with all their efforts.
She is the 10th and 11th Vice President of the Republic of China. She has served as acting chairman of the Democratic Progressive Party (DPP), governor of Taoyuan County, adviser to President Lee Teng-hui (appointed by President Lee Teng-hui), and legislative member.
She is one of the key advocates of the Taiwan Democratic Movement and the Women's Movement and one of the important leaders of the Taiwan Independence Movement.
She advocated the 1996 consensus and peaceful neutrality, which had a considerable impact on Taiwan ’ s “international status. ” Lu was the first female vice president in the history of the Republic of China and the only vice president to be re-elected after the lifting of martial law.

A tourist from Argentina faces a prison for damage to Machu Picchu Moscow.
January 15th.
INTERFAX.RU - Argentinean tourist can be sentenced to prison terms for causing irreparable damage to one of the buildings of the ancient city of Machu Picchu in Peru, the portal Diario Correo reports.
"An Argentinean member of a group of six tourists, including another Argentinean, Brazilian, Chilean and French, illegally entered the forbidden zone of the Temple of the Sun.
The tourist broke a piece of stone in the building, causing a part of the wall to collapse and a crack in the floor.
When the guards detained a group of tourists, feces were also found on the floor, "the portal writes.
The travelers were arrested, five of them would be deported from the country and fined.
"An Argentine citizen has taken the direct responsibility for causing damage to the cultural heritage.
The court will determine whether he will be imprisoned ", the portal notes.
As Diario Correo adds, the police in Machu Picchu are developing new strategies that will help prevent such crimes in the future.
The number of staff will also be increased from the current 16.
Machu Picchu is a city of Inca civilization located in the Andes, it was founded in the 15th century and later abandoned.
Machu Picchu is known for the fact that all walls are built without the use of adhesive material, and there are also unusual astronomical structures here.
The city was recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1983.
